description: Discover Unity Test Framework tests in the connected Unity Editor. Use this before running tests to inspect available EditMode and PlayMode tests. Returns a pruned assembly -> fixture -> test tree with source paths when Unity can resolve them.

test_name.description: Optional exact test method filter, case-insensitive.

search.description: Optional fuzzy contains search across assembly, fixture, test full name, and source path. Combined with exact filters using AND semantics.
